name: Heavenly Hash Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, combine the butter, chocolate and pecans.
2. Cook over moderate heat until melted, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
3. Pour the mixture evenly over the popped corn and marshmallows.
4. Stir well to ensure even coating.
5. Spread the popcorn on a buttered cookie sheet.
6. Refrigerate until cooled before serving.
